response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload performance analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is entirely in full-stack web and mobile development, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or low-level system optimization for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and open-source complex systems (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Demonstrated leadership in developer education and tooling
concerns: No experience with SoC, IP, or hardware modeling for AI accelerators
No exposure to GPU architecture, deep-learning workload optimization, or performance analysis at hardware level
Education is a BS in CS — insufficient without 8+ years of relevant hardware/systems experience, which is not demonstrated

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or GPU performance optimization background
Web/mobile focus vs. required systems/hardware expertise
